authors_text: Zeba Ghaffar,Pir Masoom Shah,Hikmat Khan,Syed Farhan Alam Zaidi,Abdullah Gani,Izaz Ahmad Khan,Munam Ali Shah,Saif ul Islam
title: Comparative Analysis of State-of-the-Art Deep Learning Models for Detecting COVID-19 Lung Infection from Chest X-Ray Images
title_zh: 从胸部 X 射线图像检测 COVID-19 肺部感染的最先进深度学习模型的比较分析
abstract: The ongoing COVID-19 pandemic has already taken millions of lives and damaged economies across the globe. Most COVID-19 deaths and economic losses are reported from densely crowded cities. It is comprehensible that the effective control and prevention of epidemic/pandemic infectious diseases is vital. According to WHO, testing and diagnosis is the best strategy to control pandemics. Scientists worldwide are attempting to develop various innovative and cost-efficient methods to speed up the testing process. This paper comprehensively evaluates the applicability of the recent top ten state-of-the-art Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for automatically detecting COVID-19 infection using chest X-ray images. Moreover, it provides a comparative analysis of these models in terms of accuracy. This study identifies the effective methodologies to control and prevent infectious respiratory diseases. Our trained models have demonstrated outstanding results in classifying the COVID-19 infected chest x-rays. In particular, our trained models MobileNet, EfficentNet, and InceptionV3 achieved a classification average accuracy of 95\%, 95\%, and 94\% test set for COVID-19 class classification, respectively. Thus, it can be beneficial for clinical practitioners and radiologists to speed up the testing, detection, and follow-up of COVID-19 cases.

abstract_zh: 持续不断的 COVID-19 大流行已夺去了全球数百万人的生命，并损害了全球经济。大多数 COVID-19 死亡和经济损失都发生在人口稠密的城市。可以理解，有效控制和预防流行性传染病至关重要。世界卫生组织表示，检测和诊断是控制流行病的最佳策略。世界各地的科学家正在尝试开发各种创新且经济高效的方法来加快测试过程。本文全面评估了最近十大最先进的深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在使用胸部 X 射线图像自动检测 COVID-19 感染方面的适用性。此外，它还提供了这些模型在准确性方面的比较分析。这项研究确定了控制和预防传染性呼吸道疾病的有效方法。我们训练有素的模型在对 COVID-19 感染的胸部 X 光片进行分类方面表现出了出色的结果。特别是，我们训练的模型 MobileNet、EfficentNet 和 InceptionV3 在 COVID-19 类分类测试集上分别实现了 95\%、95\% 和 94\% 的分类平均准确率。因此，加快 COVID-19 病例的测试、检测和随访对于临床医生和放射科医生来说是有益的。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了最先进的深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在胸部X光图像中自动检测COVID-19感染的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 由于COVID-19疫情对全球生命和经济造成重大影响，快速且准确的诊断方法对控制疫情至关重要。
AI.method: 训练并测试了当前前十种最先进的CNN模型（如MobileNet、EfficientNet、InceptionV3），通过胸部X光图像进行分类，并比较其准确率。
AI.result: MobileNet、EfficientNet和InceptionV3模型在测试集上的分类准确率分别为95%、95%和94%。
AI.conclusion: 这些模型可有效辅助临床医生加速COVID-19的检测与后续追踪，为疫情控制提供技术支持。

authors_text: Chris Clifton,Bradley Malin,Anna Oganian,Ramesh Raskar,Vivek Sharma
title: A Roadmap for Greater Public Use of Privacy-Sensitive Government Data: Workshop Report
title_zh: 扩大公众使用隐私敏感政府数据的路线图：研讨会报告
comment: 23 pages. Web: https://may2021privacy.github.io/
comments: 23 pages. Web: https://may2021privacy.github.io/
abstract: Government agencies collect and manage a wide range of ever-growing datasets. While such data has the potential to support research and evidence-based policy making, there are concerns that the dissemination of such data could infringe upon the privacy of the individuals (or organizations) from whom such data was collected. To appraise the current state of data sharing, as well as learn about opportunities for stimulating such sharing at a faster pace, a virtual workshop was held on May 21st and 26th, 2021, sponsored by the National Science Foundation (NSF) and National Institute of Standards and Technologies (NIST), and the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP), where a multinational collection of researchers and practitioners were brought together to discuss their experiences and learn about recently developed technologies for managing privacy while sharing data. The workshop specifically focused on challenges and successes in government data sharing at various levels. The first day focused on successful examples of new technology applied to sharing of public data, including formal privacy techniques, synthetic data, and cryptographic approaches. Day two emphasized brainstorming sessions on some of the challenges and directions to address them.
summary: Government agencies collect and manage a wide range of ever-growing datasets. While such data has the potential to support research and evidence-based policy making, there are concerns that the dissemination of such data could infringe upon the privacy of the individuals (or organizations) from whom such data was collected. To appraise the current state of data sharing, as well as learn about opportunities for stimulating such sharing at a faster pace, a virtual workshop was held on May 21st and 26th, 2021, sponsored by the National Science Foundation (NSF) and National Institute of Standards and Technologies (NIST), and the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP), where a multinational collection of researchers and practitioners were brought together to discuss their experiences and learn about recently developed technologies for managing privacy while sharing data. The workshop specifically focused on challenges and successes in government data sharing at various levels. The first day focused on successful examples of new technology applied to sharing of public data, including formal privacy techniques, synthetic data, and cryptographic approaches. Day two emphasized brainstorming sessions on some of the challenges and directions to address them.
abstract_zh: 政府机构收集和管理各种不断增长的数据集。虽然此类数据有可能支持研究和基于证据的政策制定，但有人担心此类数据的传播可能会侵犯收集此类数据的个人（或组织）的隐私。为了评估数据共享的现状，并了解以更快的速度促进此类共享的机会，由美国国家科学基金会 (NSF)、美国国家标准与技术研究所 (NIST) 以及白宫科学技术政策办公室 (OSTP) 主办的虚拟研讨会于 2021 年 5 月 21 日至 26 日举行，跨国研究人员和从业人员齐聚一堂，讨论他们的经验，并了解最近开发的在共享数据的同时管理隐私的技术。研讨会特别关注各级政府数据共享的挑战和成功。第一天的重点是应用于公共数据共享的新技术的成功示例，包括正式的隐私技术、合成数据和加密方法。第二天的重点是针对一些挑战和解决这些挑战的方向进行集思广益。

AI.tldr: 本文通过虚拟研讨会探讨如何在保护隐私的前提下促进政府敏感数据的公共使用，总结技术应用与挑战应对策略。
AI.motivation: 政府数据具有科研与政策制定价值，但隐私风险阻碍其共享，需平衡数据利用与隐私保护。
AI.method: 由NSF、NIST和OSTP联合举办虚拟研讨会，召集国际专家讨论隐私技术应用案例及共享障碍解决方案。
AI.result: 提出合成数据、加密技术等隐私保护方法，识别出法律、技术及跨机构协作等关键挑战，并规划未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 需通过技术创新与政策协同，建立可信数据共享框架，以实现隐私保护与公共利益的平衡。

authors_text: Hiroyasu Akada,Jian Wang,Soshi Shimada,Masaki Takahashi,Christian Theobalt,Vladislav Golyanik
title: UnrealEgo: A New Dataset for Robust Egocentric 3D Human Motion Capture
title_zh: UnrealEgo：用于稳健的以自我为中心的 3D 人体动作捕捉的新数据集
comment: 21 pages, 10 figures, 10 tables; project page: https://4dqv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/UnrealEgo/
comments: 21 pages, 10 figures, 10 tables; project page: https://4dqv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/UnrealEgo/
abstract: We present UnrealEgo, i.e., a new large-scale naturalistic dataset for egocentric 3D human pose estimation. UnrealEgo is based on an advanced concept of eyeglasses equipped with two fisheye cameras that can be used in unconstrained environments. We design their virtual prototype and attach them to 3D human models for stereo view capture. We next generate a large corpus of human motions. As a consequence, UnrealEgo is the first dataset to provide in-the-wild stereo images with the largest variety of motions among existing egocentric datasets. Furthermore, we propose a new benchmark method with a simple but effective idea of devising a 2D keypoint estimation module for stereo inputs to improve 3D human pose estimation. The extensive experiments show that our approach outperforms the previous state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively. UnrealEgo and our source codes are available on our project web page.
summary: We present UnrealEgo, i.e., a new large-scale naturalistic dataset for egocentric 3D human pose estimation. UnrealEgo is based on an advanced concept of eyeglasses equipped with two fisheye cameras that can be used in unconstrained environments. We design their virtual prototype and attach them to 3D human models for stereo view capture. We next generate a large corpus of human motions. As a consequence, UnrealEgo is the first dataset to provide in-the-wild stereo images with the largest variety of motions among existing egocentric datasets. Furthermore, we propose a new benchmark method with a simple but effective idea of devising a 2D keypoint estimation module for stereo inputs to improve 3D human pose estimation. The extensive experiments show that our approach outperforms the previous state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively. UnrealEgo and our source codes are available on our project web page.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 UnrealEgo，即一个新的大规模自然数据集，用于以自我为中心的 3D 人体姿势估计。 UnrealEgo 基于配备两个鱼眼摄像头的先进眼镜概念，可在不受限制的环境中使用。我们设计他们的虚拟原型并将其附加到 3D 人体模型上以进行立体视图捕获。接下来我们生成一个大型的人体动作语料库。因此，UnrealEgo 是第一个提供野外立体图像的数据集，在现有的以自我为中心的数据集中，其运动种类最多。此外，我们提出了一种新的基准方法，其简单但有效的想法是为立体输入设计 2D 关键点估计模块，以改进 3D 人体姿势估计。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在质量和数量上都优于以前最先进的方法。 UnrealEgo 和我们的源代码可在我们的项目网页上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UnrealEgo数据集及基准方法，用于提升第一人称视角下的3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集在真实环境下的立体图像和运动多样性不足，难以满足鲁棒的3D姿态估计需求。
AI.method: 设计虚拟原型眼镜搭载双鱼眼相机，生成大规模自然运动数据，并提出基于立体输入的2D关键点估计模块优化3D姿态估计。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: UnrealEgo为第一人称3D人体运动捕捉提供了新数据集和基准，推动相关技术发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出UnrealEgo数据集及基准方法，用于提升第一人称视角下的3D人体姿态估计。
ai_content.motivation: 现有数据集在真实环境下的立体图像和运动多样性不足，难以满足鲁棒的3D姿态估计需求。
ai_content.method: 设计虚拟原型眼镜搭载双鱼眼相机，生成大规模自然运动数据，并提出基于立体输入的2D关键点估计模块优化3D姿态估计。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
ai_content.conclusion: UnrealEgo为第一人称3D人体运动捕捉提供了新数据集和基准，推动相关技术发展。

search_text: UnrealEgo: A New Dataset for Robust Egocentric 3D Human Motion Capture UnrealEgo：用于稳健的以自我为中心的 3D 人体动作捕捉的新数据集 We present UnrealEgo, i.e., a new large-scale naturalistic dataset for egocentric 3D human pose estimation. UnrealEgo is based on an advanced concept of eyeglasses equipped with two fisheye cameras that can be used in unconstrained environments. We design their virtual prototype and attach them to 3D human models for stereo view capture. We next generate a large corpus of human motions. As a consequence, UnrealEgo is the first dataset to provide in-the-wild stereo images with the largest variety of motions among existing egocentric datasets. Furthermore, we propose a new benchmark method with a simple but effective idea of devising a 2D keypoint estimation module for stereo inputs to improve 3D human pose estimation. The extensive experiments show that our approach outperforms the previous state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively. UnrealEgo and our source codes are available on our project web page. 我们提出了 UnrealEgo，即一个新的大规模自然数据集，用于以自我为中心的 3D 人体姿势估计。 UnrealEgo 基于配备两个鱼眼摄像头的先进眼镜概念，可在不受限制的环境中使用。我们设计他们的虚拟原型并将其附加到 3D 人体模型上以进行立体视图捕获。接下来我们生成一个大型的人体动作语料库。因此，UnrealEgo 是第一个提供野外立体图像的数据集，在现有的以自我为中心的数据集中，其运动种类最多。此外，我们提出了一种新的基准方法，其简单但有效的想法是为立体输入设计 2D 关键点估计模块，以改进 3D 人体姿势估计。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在质量和数量上都优于以前最先进的方法。 UnrealEgo 和我们的源代码可在我们的项目网页上找到。 本文提出UnrealEgo数据集及基准方法，用于提升第一人称视角下的3D人体姿态估计。 Hiroyasu Akada,Jian Wang,Soshi Shimada,Masaki Takahashi,Christian Theobalt,Vladislav Golyanik cs.CV

authors_text: Junqi Tang,Matthias Ehrhardt,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: Stochastic Primal-Dual Three Operator Splitting Algorithm with Extension to Equivariant Regularization-by-Denoising
title_zh: 扩展到等变正则化去噪的随机原对偶三算子分裂算法
comment: SSVM-2025
comments: SSVM-2025
abstract: In this work we propose a stochastic primal-dual three-operator splitting algorithm (TOS-SPDHG) for solving a class of convex three-composite optimization problems. Our proposed scheme is a direct three-operator splitting extension of the SPDHG algorithm [Chambolle et al. 2018]. We provide theoretical convergence analysis showing ergodic $O(1/K)$ convergence rate, and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in imaging inverse problems. Moreover, we further propose TOS-SPDHG-RED and TOS-SPDHG-eRED which utilizes the regularization-by-denoising (RED) framework to leverage pretrained deep denoising networks as priors.
summary: In this work we propose a stochastic primal-dual three-operator splitting algorithm (TOS-SPDHG) for solving a class of convex three-composite optimization problems. Our proposed scheme is a direct three-operator splitting extension of the SPDHG algorithm [Chambolle et al. 2018]. We provide theoretical convergence analysis showing ergodic $O(1/K)$ convergence rate, and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in imaging inverse problems. Moreover, we further propose TOS-SPDHG-RED and TOS-SPDHG-eRED which utilizes the regularization-by-denoising (RED) framework to leverage pretrained deep denoising networks as priors.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种随机原对偶三算子分裂算法（TOS-SPDHG）来解决一类凸三复合优化问题。我们提出的方案是 SPDHG 算法的直接三算子分裂扩展 [Chambolle 等人。 2018]。我们提供理论收敛分析，显示遍历 $O(1/K)$ 收敛率，并证明我们的方法在成像逆问题中的有效性。此外，我们还提出了 TOS-SPDHG-RED 和 TOS-SPDHG-eRED，它们利用去噪正则化（RED）框架来利用预训练的深度去噪网络作为先验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种随机对偶三算子分裂算法（TOS-SPDHG），并扩展至等变去噪正则化框架，用于解决图像逆问题中的凸优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有优化算法在处理复杂图像逆问题时效率不足，需结合深度学习先验知识提升重建效果。
AI.method: 提出TOS-SPDHG算法作为SPDHG的三算子扩展，并进一步结合RED框架，利用预训练去噪网络作为正则化先验。
AI.result: 理论证明了算法的O(1/K)收敛率，并在图像逆问题中验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新算法在理论分析和实际应用中均表现优异，扩展至RED框架后可提升图像重建性能。

authors_text: Amir Hertz,Ron Mokady,Jay Tenenbaum,Kfir Aberman,Yael Pritch,Daniel Cohen-Or
title: Prompt-to-Prompt Image Editing with Cross Attention Control
title_zh: 使用交叉注意力控制进行提示到提示图像编辑
abstract: Recent large-scale text-driven synthesis models have attracted much attention thanks to their remarkable capabilities of generating highly diverse images that follow given text prompts. Such text-based synthesis methods are particularly appealing to humans who are used to verbally describe their intent. Therefore, it is only natural to extend the text-driven image synthesis to text-driven image editing. Editing is challenging for these generative models, since an innate property of an editing technique is to preserve most of the original image, while in the text-based models, even a small modification of the text prompt often leads to a completely different outcome. State-of-the-art methods mitigate this by requiring the users to provide a spatial mask to localize the edit, hence, ignoring the original structure and content within the masked region. In this paper, we pursue an intuitive prompt-to-prompt editing framework, where the edits are controlled by text only. To this end, we analyze a text-conditioned model in depth and observe that the cross-attention layers are the key to controlling the relation between the spatial layout of the image to each word in the prompt. With this observation, we present several applications which monitor the image synthesis by editing the textual prompt only. This includes localized editing by replacing a word, global editing by adding a specification, and even delicately controlling the extent to which a word is reflected in the image. We present our results over diverse images and prompts, demonstrating high-quality synthesis and fidelity to the edited prompts.
summary: Recent large-scale text-driven synthesis models have attracted much attention thanks to their remarkable capabilities of generating highly diverse images that follow given text prompts. Such text-based synthesis methods are particularly appealing to humans who are used to verbally describe their intent. Therefore, it is only natural to extend the text-driven image synthesis to text-driven image editing. Editing is challenging for these generative models, since an innate property of an editing technique is to preserve most of the original image, while in the text-based models, even a small modification of the text prompt often leads to a completely different outcome. State-of-the-art methods mitigate this by requiring the users to provide a spatial mask to localize the edit, hence, ignoring the original structure and content within the masked region. In this paper, we pursue an intuitive prompt-to-prompt editing framework, where the edits are controlled by text only. To this end, we analyze a text-conditioned model in depth and observe that the cross-attention layers are the key to controlling the relation between the spatial layout of the image to each word in the prompt. With this observation, we present several applications which monitor the image synthesis by editing the textual prompt only. This includes localized editing by replacing a word, global editing by adding a specification, and even delicately controlling the extent to which a word is reflected in the image. We present our results over diverse images and prompts, demonstrating high-quality synthesis and fidelity to the edited prompts.
abstract_zh: 最近的大规模文本驱动合成模型因其按照给定文本提示生成高度多样化图像的卓越能力而引起了广泛关注。这种基于文本的合成方法对于习惯于口头描述其意图的人类来说特别有吸引力。因此，将文本驱动的图像合成扩展到文本驱动的图像编辑是很自然的。对于这些生成模型来说，编辑具有挑战性，因为编辑技术的固有属性是保留大部分原始图像，而在基于文本的模型中，即使对文本提示进行很小的修改也常常会导致完全不同的结果。最先进的方法通过要求用户提供空间掩模来本地化编辑来缓解这种情况，从而忽略掩模区域内的原始结构和内容。在本文中，我们追求一种直观的提示到提示编辑框架，其中编辑仅由文本控制。为此，我们深入分析了文本条件模型，并观察到交叉注意层是控制图像空间布局与提示中每个单词之间关系的关键。根据这一观察，我们提出了几个仅通过编辑文本提示来监控图像合成的应用程序。这包括通过替换单词进行本地编辑，通过添加规范进行全局编辑，甚至精细地控制单词在图像中反映的程度。我们通过不同的图像和提示展示我们的结果，展示高质量的合成和对编辑提示的保真度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本提示的图像编辑框架，通过控制交叉注意力机制实现无需空间掩码的文本到文本图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有文本生成模型在图像编辑任务中需依赖空间掩码，导致忽略原始图像内容；需开发仅通过文本提示即可实现结构保留的编辑方法。
AI.method: 深入分析文本条件模型的交叉注意力层，发现其控制图像空间布局与文本词的关系，通过编辑文本提示实现局部/全局修改及词权重调控。
AI.result: 在多样化图像和提示上实现高质量编辑，支持词替换、属性添加及细粒度控制，保持编辑后图像与原始结构的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 证明仅通过文本提示即可实现可控图像编辑，交叉注意力机制为文本到图像生成模型提供了新的编辑范式。

authors_text: Saumil Bandyopadhyay,Alexander Sludds,Stefan Krastanov,Ryan Hamerly,Nicholas Harris,Darius Bunandar,Matthew Streshinsky,Michael Hochberg,Dirk Englund
title: Single chip photonic deep neural network with accelerated training
title_zh: 具有加速训练功能的单芯片光子深度神经网络
comment: 21 pages, 10 figures. Comments welcome
comments: 21 pages, 10 figures. Comments welcome
abstract: As deep neural networks (DNNs) revolutionize machine learning, energy consumption and throughput are emerging as fundamental limitations of CMOS electronics. This has motivated a search for new hardware architectures optimized for artificial intelligence, such as electronic systolic arrays, memristor crossbar arrays, and optical accelerators. Optical systems can perform linear matrix operations at exceptionally high rate and efficiency, motivating recent demonstrations of low latency linear algebra and optical energy consumption below a photon per multiply-accumulate operation. However, demonstrating systems that co-integrate both linear and nonlinear processing units in a single chip remains a central challenge. Here we introduce such a system in a scalable photonic integrated circuit (PIC), enabled by several key advances: (i) high-bandwidth and low-power programmable nonlinear optical function units (NOFUs); (ii) coherent matrix multiplication units (CMXUs); and (iii) in situ training with optical acceleration. We experimentally demonstrate this fully-integrated coherent optical neural network (FICONN) architecture for a 3-layer DNN comprising 12 NOFUs and three CMXUs operating in the telecom C-band. Using in situ training on a vowel classification task, the FICONN achieves 92.7% accuracy on a test set, which is identical to the accuracy obtained on a digital computer with the same number of weights. This work lends experimental evidence to theoretical proposals for in situ training, unlocking orders of magnitude improvements in the throughput of training data. Moreover, the FICONN opens the path to inference at nanosecond latency and femtojoule per operation energy efficiency.

abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络 (DNN) 彻底改变机器学习，能耗和吞吐量逐渐成为 CMOS 电子器件的基本限制。这促使人们寻找针对人工智能优化的新硬件架构，例如电子脉动阵列、忆阻器交叉阵列和光学加速器。光学系统可以以极高的速率和效率执行线性矩阵运算，这推动了最近的低延迟线性代数演示以及每次乘法累加运算低于一个光子的光学能耗的演示。然而，演示将线性和非线性处理单元共同集成在单个芯片中的系统仍然是一个主要挑战。在这里，我们在可扩展光子集成电路（PIC）中引入了这样的系统，该系统通过几个关键进步实现：（i）高带宽和低功耗可编程非线性光学功能单元（NOFU）； (ii) 相干矩阵乘法单元（CMXU）； (iii) 光学加速原位训练。我们通过实验演示了这种完全集成的相干光神经网络 (FICONN) 架构，该架构适用于 3 层 DNN，其中包括 12 个 NOFU 和 3 个在电信 C 频段运行的 CMXU。使用元音分类任务的原位训练，FICONN 在测试集上实现了 92.7% 的准确率，这与在相同权重数量的数字计算机上获得的准确率相同。这项工作为原位训练的理论建议提供了实验证据，使训练数据的吞吐量实现了数量级的提高。此外，FICONN 开辟了以纳秒延迟和飞焦单位操作能源效率进行推理的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单芯片光子深度神经网络（FICONN），通过集成非线性光学单元和相干矩阵乘法单元，实现了加速训练的光子计算架构。
AI.motivation: 传统CMOS电子器件在能效和吞吐量上面临瓶颈，而光学系统虽能高效执行线性运算，但集成线性与非线性处理单元的单芯片系统仍是核心挑战。
AI.method: 开发了高带宽低功耗的可编程非线性光学单元（NOFUs）、相干矩阵乘法单元（CMXUs）及光学加速的原位训练方法，并在电信C波段构建了包含12个NOFUs和3个CMXUs的3层DNN架构。
AI.result: 在元音分类任务中，FICONN测试集准确率达92.7%，与同等权重数量的数字计算机性能一致，同时实现训练数据吞吐量级提升。
AI.conclusion: 验证了原位训练理论可行性，展示了纳秒级推理延迟和每操作飞焦级能效的潜力，为光子AI芯片发展提供了实验依据。

authors_text: Rinon Gal,Yuval Alaluf,Yuval Atzmon,Or Patashnik,Amit H. Bermano,Gal Chechik,Daniel Cohen-Or
title: An Image is Worth One Word: Personalizing Text-to-Image Generation using Textual Inversion
title_zh: 一张图像值得一个字：使用文本反转个性化文本到图像的生成
comment: Project page: https://textual-inversion.github.io
comments: Project page: https://textual-inversion.github.io
abstract: Text-to-image models offer unprecedented freedom to guide creation through natural language. Yet, it is unclear how such freedom can be exercised to generate images of specific unique concepts, modify their appearance, or compose them in new roles and novel scenes. In other words, we ask: how can we use language-guided models to turn our cat into a painting, or imagine a new product based on our favorite toy? Here we present a simple approach that allows such creative freedom. Using only 3-5 images of a user-provided concept, like an object or a style, we learn to represent it through new "words" in the embedding space of a frozen text-to-image model. These "words" can be composed into natural language sentences, guiding personalized creation in an intuitive way. Notably, we find evidence that a single word embedding is sufficient for capturing unique and varied concepts. We compare our approach to a wide range of baselines, and demonstrate that it can more faithfully portray the concepts across a range of applications and tasks. Our code, data and new words will be available at: https://textual-inversion.github.io
summary: Text-to-image models offer unprecedented freedom to guide creation through natural language. Yet, it is unclear how such freedom can be exercised to generate images of specific unique concepts, modify their appearance, or compose them in new roles and novel scenes. In other words, we ask: how can we use language-guided models to turn our cat into a painting, or imagine a new product based on our favorite toy? Here we present a simple approach that allows such creative freedom. Using only 3-5 images of a user-provided concept, like an object or a style, we learn to represent it through new "words" in the embedding space of a frozen text-to-image model. These "words" can be composed into natural language sentences, guiding personalized creation in an intuitive way. Notably, we find evidence that a single word embedding is sufficient for capturing unique and varied concepts. We compare our approach to a wide range of baselines, and demonstrate that it can more faithfully portray the concepts across a range of applications and tasks. Our code, data and new words will be available at: https://textual-inversion.github.io
abstract_zh: 文本到图像模型提供了前所未有的自由来通过自然语言指导创作。然而，目前尚不清楚如何运用这种自由来生成特定独特概念的图像、修改它们的外观或将它们组合成新的角色和新颖的场景。换句话说，我们要问：如何使用语言引导模型将我们的猫变成一幅画，或者根据我们最喜欢的玩具想象一个新产品？在这里，我们提出了一种允许这种创作自由的简单方法。仅使用用户提供的概念（例如对象或样式）的 3-5 个图像，我们学习通过冻结文本到图像模型的嵌入空间中的新“单词”来表示它。这些“词”可以组成自然语言句子，以直观的方式指导个性化创作。值得注意的是，我们发现证据表明单个词嵌入足以捕获独特且多样化的概念。我们将我们的方法与广泛的基线进行比较，并证明它可以更忠实地描述一系列应用程序和任务中的概念。我们的代码、数据和新词将在以下位置提供：https://textual-inversion.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过文本反转技术实现个性化图文生成的方法，仅需3-5张用户提供的概念图像即可学习新的嵌入表示。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型难以精准生成特定独特概念或修改其表现形式，需探索如何用自然语言引导模型实现个性化创作。
AI.method: 在冻结的文本到图像模型嵌入空间中，通过用户提供的少量图像学习新'词语'嵌入，将这些嵌入组合到自然语言句子中指导生成。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种应用场景中能更忠实呈现概念，且单个词嵌入即可捕捉多样化的独特概念。
AI.conclusion: 文本反转技术为个性化图文生成提供了直观高效的解决方案，通过少量样本即可实现概念定制与场景重构。

authors_text: Wolfgang Gatterbauer,Cody Dunne,H. V. Jagadish,Mirek Riedewald
title: Principles of Query Visualization
title_zh: 查询可视化的原理
comment: 20 pages, 12 figures, preprint for IEEE Data Engineering Bulletin
comments: 20 pages, 12 figures, preprint for IEEE Data Engineering Bulletin
abstract: Query Visualization (QV) is the problem of transforming a given query into a graphical representation that helps humans understand its meaning. This task is notably different from designing a Visual Query Language (VQL) that helps a user compose a query. This article discusses the principles of relational query visualization and its potential for simplifying user interactions with relational data.
summary: Query Visualization (QV) is the problem of transforming a given query into a graphical representation that helps humans understand its meaning. This task is notably different from designing a Visual Query Language (VQL) that helps a user compose a query. This article discusses the principles of relational query visualization and its potential for simplifying user interactions with relational data.
abstract_zh: 查询可视化（QV）是将给定查询转换为图形表示形式以帮助人们理解其含义的问题。此任务与设计帮助用户编写查询的可视化查询语言 (VQL) 明显不同。本文讨论关系查询可视化的原理及其简化用户与关系数据交互的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了关系查询可视化的原理，旨在通过图形化表示帮助用户理解查询含义，而非设计用于构建查询的可视化语言。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于通过可视化语言辅助用户构建查询，而缺乏对如何将已有查询转化为直观图形以提升理解的系统性研究。
AI.method: 分析关系查询的结构特性，提出可视化表示的原则，并探讨其在简化用户与关系数据交互中的应用潜力。
AI.result: 总结了关系查询可视化的核心原则，验证了其在降低用户认知负担和提升查询理解效率方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 查询可视化为用户与关系数据库的交互提供了新思路，未来需进一步探索其在实际场景中的实现与优化。

authors_text: Matthias Mayr,Carl Hvarfner,Konstantinos Chatzilygeroudis,Luigi Nardi,Volker Krueger
title: Learning Skill-based Industrial Robot Tasks with User Priors
title_zh: 根据用户先验学习基于技能的工业机器人任务
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, accepted at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, accepted at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
abstract: Robot skills systems are meant to reduce robot setup time for new manufacturing tasks. Yet, for dexterous, contact-rich tasks, it is often difficult to find the right skill parameters. One strategy is to learn these parameters by allowing the robot system to learn directly on the task. For a learning problem, a robot operator can typically specify the type and range of values of the parameters. Nevertheless, given their prior experience, robot operators should be able to help the learning process further by providing educated guesses about where in the parameter space potential optimal solutions could be found. Interestingly, such prior knowledge is not exploited in current robot learning frameworks. We introduce an approach that combines user priors and Bayesian optimization to allow fast optimization of robot industrial tasks at robot deployment time. We evaluate our method on three tasks that are learned in simulation as well as on two tasks that are learned directly on a real robot system. Additionally, we transfer knowledge from the corresponding simulation tasks by automatically constructing priors from well-performing configurations for learning on the real system. To handle potentially contradicting task objectives, the tasks are modeled as multi-objective problems. Our results show that operator priors, both user-specified and transferred, vastly accelerate the discovery of rich Pareto fronts, and typically produce final performance far superior to proposed baselines.
summary: Robot skills systems are meant to reduce robot setup time for new manufacturing tasks. Yet, for dexterous, contact-rich tasks, it is often difficult to find the right skill parameters. One strategy is to learn these parameters by allowing the robot system to learn directly on the task. For a learning problem, a robot operator can typically specify the type and range of values of the parameters. Nevertheless, given their prior experience, robot operators should be able to help the learning process further by providing educated guesses about where in the parameter space potential optimal solutions could be found. Interestingly, such prior knowledge is not exploited in current robot learning frameworks. We introduce an approach that combines user priors and Bayesian optimization to allow fast optimization of robot industrial tasks at robot deployment time. We evaluate our method on three tasks that are learned in simulation as well as on two tasks that are learned directly on a real robot system. Additionally, we transfer knowledge from the corresponding simulation tasks by automatically constructing priors from well-performing configurations for learning on the real system. To handle potentially contradicting task objectives, the tasks are modeled as multi-objective problems. Our results show that operator priors, both user-specified and transferred, vastly accelerate the discovery of rich Pareto fronts, and typically produce final performance far superior to proposed baselines.
abstract_zh: 机器人技能系统旨在减少机器人完成新制造任务的设置时间。然而，对于灵巧、接触丰富的任务，通常很难找到正确的技能参数。一种策略是通过允许机器人系统直接学习任务来学习这些参数。对于学习问题，机器人操作员通常可以指定参数值的类型和范围。然而，鉴于他们之前的经验，机器人操作员应该能够通过提供有关在参数空间中哪里可以找到潜在最佳解决方案的有根据的猜测来进一步帮助学习过程。有趣的是，当前的机器人学习框架并未利用此类先验知识。我们引入了一种结合用户先验和贝叶斯优化的方法，以允许在机器人部署时快速优化机器人工业任务。我们在模拟中学习的三个任务以及直接在真实机器人系统上学习的两个任务上评估我们的方法。此外，我们通过从性能良好的配置自动构建先验知识来转移相应模拟任务的知识，以便在真实系统上进行学习。为了处理潜在矛盾的任务目标，任务被建模为多目标问题。我们的结果表明，算子先验（无论是用户指定的还是转移的）都极大地加速了丰富帕累托前沿的发现，并且通常产生远远优于建议基线的最终性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合用户先验知识和贝叶斯优化的方法，以加速工业机器人任务的优化过程。
AI.motivation: 在复杂的工业机器人任务中，找到合适的技能参数非常困难，而当前的机器人学习框架未能有效利用操作员的先验知识。
AI.method: 本文的方法结合了用户提供的先验知识与贝叶斯优化，并通过从仿真任务中迁移知识来提高实际机器人系统的性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用用户指定和迁移的先验知识显著加速了帕累托前沿的发现，并且最终性能远优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 用户先验知识的引入和迁移可以有效提升工业机器人任务的优化效率和性能。

authors_text: Matteo Mancini,Derek K. Jones,Marco Palombo
title: Lossy compression of multidimensional medical images using sinusoidal activation networks: an evaluation study
title_zh: 使用正弦激活网络进行多维医学图像的有损压缩：一项评估研究
abstract: In this work, we evaluate how neural networks with periodic activation functions can be leveraged to reliably compress large multidimensional medical image datasets, with proof-of-concept application to 4D diffusion-weighted MRI (dMRI). In the medical imaging landscape, multidimensional MRI is a key area of research for developing biomarkers that are both sensitive and specific to the underlying tissue microstructure. However, the high-dimensional nature of these data poses a challenge in terms of both storage and sharing capabilities and associated costs, requiring appropriate algorithms able to represent the information in a low-dimensional space. Recent theoretical developments in deep learning have shown how periodic activation functions are a powerful tool for implicit neural representation of images and can be used for compression of 2D images. Here we extend this approach to 4D images and show how any given 4D dMRI dataset can be accurately represented through the parameters of a sinusoidal activation network, achieving a data compression rate about 10 times higher than the standard DEFLATE algorithm. Our results show that the proposed approach outperforms benchmark ReLU and Tanh activation perceptron architectures in terms of mean squared error, peak signal-to-noise ratio and structural similarity index. Subsequent analyses using the tensor and spherical harmonics representations demonstrate that the proposed lossy compression reproduces accurately the characteristics of the original data, leading to relative errors about 5 to 10 times lower than the benchmark JPEG2000 lossy compression and similar to standard pre-processing steps such as MP-PCA denosing, suggesting a loss of information within the currently accepted levels for clinical application.
summary: In this work, we evaluate how neural networks with periodic activation functions can be leveraged to reliably compress large multidimensional medical image datasets, with proof-of-concept application to 4D diffusion-weighted MRI (dMRI). In the medical imaging landscape, multidimensional MRI is a key area of research for developing biomarkers that are both sensitive and specific to the underlying tissue microstructure. However, the high-dimensional nature of these data poses a challenge in terms of both storage and sharing capabilities and associated costs, requiring appropriate algorithms able to represent the information in a low-dimensional space. Recent theoretical developments in deep learning have shown how periodic activation functions are a powerful tool for implicit neural representation of images and can be used for compression of 2D images. Here we extend this approach to 4D images and show how any given 4D dMRI dataset can be accurately represented through the parameters of a sinusoidal activation network, achieving a data compression rate about 10 times higher than the standard DEFLATE algorithm. Our results show that the proposed approach outperforms benchmark ReLU and Tanh activation perceptron architectures in terms of mean squared error, peak signal-to-noise ratio and structural similarity index. Subsequent analyses using the tensor and spherical harmonics representations demonstrate that the proposed lossy compression reproduces accurately the characteristics of the original data, leading to relative errors about 5 to 10 times lower than the benchmark JPEG2000 lossy compression and similar to standard pre-processing steps such as MP-PCA denosing, suggesting a loss of information within the currently accepted levels for clinical application.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们评估了如何利用具有周期性激活函数的神经网络来可靠地压缩大型多维医学图像数据集，并将概念验证应用于 4D 扩散加权 MRI (dMRI)。在医学成像领域，多维 MRI 是开发对底层组织微观结构既敏感又具有特异性的生物标志物的关键研究领域。然而，这些数据的高维性质在存储和共享能力以及相关成本方面提出了挑战，需要能够在低维空间中表示信息的适当算法。深度学习的最新理论发展表明，周期性激活函数是图像隐式神经表示的强大工具，并且可用于压缩 2D 图像。在这里，我们将这种方法扩展到 4D 图像，并展示如何通过正弦激活网络的参数准确表示任何给定的 4D dMRI 数据集，从而实现比标准 DEFLATE 算法高约 10 倍的数据压缩率。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法在均方误差、峰值信噪比和结构相似性指数方面优于基准 ReLU 和 Tanh 激活感知器架构。使用张量和球谐函数表示的后续分析表明，所提出的有损压缩准确地再现了原始数据的特征，导致相对误差比基准 JPEG2000 有损压缩低约 5 至 10 倍，并且类似于 MP-PCA 去噪等标准预处理步骤，表明信息丢失在当前临床应用可接受的水平内。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了使用周期性激活函数的神经网络对多维医学图像进行高效压缩的方法，并在4D扩散加权MRI（dMRI）上进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 多维MRI数据因高维特性面临存储和共享难题，传统压缩算法效率不足，需探索更优的低维表示方法以满足临床需求。
AI.method: 基于周期性激活函数的神经网络（正弦激活网络）对4D dMRI数据进行参数化表示，通过对比实验验证其压缩效果。
AI.result: 压缩率较标准DEFLATE算法提升10倍，均方误差、峰值信噪比和结构相似性指标优于ReLU/Tanh模型，相对误差低于JPEG2000约5-10倍且接近临床预处理标准。
AI.conclusion: 正弦激活网络能有效压缩4D医学图像，信息损失在临床可接受范围内，为多维医学数据处理提供了新方法。

search_text: Lossy compression of multidimensional medical images using sinusoidal activation networks: an evaluation study 使用正弦激活网络进行多维医学图像的有损压缩：一项评估研究 In this work, we evaluate how neural networks with periodic activation functions can be leveraged to reliably compress large multidimensional medical image datasets, with proof-of-concept application to 4D diffusion-weighted MRI (dMRI). In the medical imaging landscape, multidimensional MRI is a key area of research for developing biomarkers that are both sensitive and specific to the underlying tissue microstructure. However, the high-dimensional nature of these data poses a challenge in terms of both storage and sharing capabilities and associated costs, requiring appropriate algorithms able to represent the information in a low-dimensional space. Recent theoretical developments in deep learning have shown how periodic activation functions are a powerful tool for implicit neural representation of images and can be used for compression of 2D images. Here we extend this approach to 4D images and show how any given 4D dMRI dataset can be accurately represented through the parameters of a sinusoidal activation network, achieving a data compression rate about 10 times higher than the standard DEFLATE algorithm. Our results show that the proposed approach outperforms benchmark ReLU and Tanh activation perceptron architectures in terms of mean squared error, peak signal-to-noise ratio and structural similarity index. Subsequent analyses using the tensor and spherical harmonics representations demonstrate that the proposed lossy compression reproduces accurately the characteristics of the original data, leading to relative errors about 5 to 10 times lower than the benchmark JPEG2000 lossy compression and similar to standard pre-processing steps such as MP-PCA denosing, suggesting a loss of information within the currently accepted levels for clinical application. 在这项工作中，我们评估了如何利用具有周期性激活函数的神经网络来可靠地压缩大型多维医学图像数据集，并将概念验证应用于 4D 扩散加权 MRI (dMRI)。在医学成像领域，多维 MRI 是开发对底层组织微观结构既敏感又具有特异性的生物标志物的关键研究领域。然而，这些数据的高维性质在存储和共享能力以及相关成本方面提出了挑战，需要能够在低维空间中表示信息的适当算法。深度学习的最新理论发展表明，周期性激活函数是图像隐式神经表示的强大工具，并且可用于压缩 2D 图像。在这里，我们将这种方法扩展到 4D 图像，并展示如何通过正弦激活网络的参数准确表示任何给定的 4D dMRI 数据集，从而实现比标准 DEFLATE 算法高约 10 倍的数据压缩率。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法在均方误差、峰值信噪比和结构相似性指数方面优于基准 ReLU 和 Tanh 激活感知器架构。使用张量和球谐函数表示的后续分析表明，所提出的有损压缩准确地再现了原始数据的特征，导致相对误差比基准 JPEG2000 有损压缩低约 5 至 10 倍，并且类似于 MP-PCA 去噪等标准预处理步骤，表明信息丢失在当前临床应用可接受的水平内。 本文评估了使用周期性激活函数的神经网络对多维医学图像进行高效压缩的方法，并在4D扩散加权MRI（dMRI）上进行了验证。 Matteo Mancini,Derek K. Jones,Marco Palombo eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Xiang Gao,Yuqi Zhang,Yingjie Tian
title: Learning to Incorporate Texture Saliency Adaptive Attention to Image Cartoonization
title_zh: 学习将纹理显着性自适应注意力纳入图像卡通化
comment: Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), PMLR 162:7183-7207, 2022
comments: Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), PMLR 162:7183-7207, 2022
abstract: Image cartoonization is recently dominated by generative adversarial networks (GANs) from the perspective of unsupervised image-to-image translation, in which an inherent challenge is to precisely capture and sufficiently transfer characteristic cartoon styles (e.g., clear edges, smooth color shading, abstract fine structures, etc.). Existing advanced models try to enhance cartoonization effect by learning to promote edges adversarially, introducing style transfer loss, or learning to align style from multiple representation space. This paper demonstrates that more distinct and vivid cartoonization effect could be easily achieved with only basic adversarial loss. Observing that cartoon style is more evident in cartoon-texture-salient local image regions, we build a region-level adversarial learning branch in parallel with the normal image-level one, which constrains adversarial learning on cartoon-texture-salient local patches for better perceiving and transferring cartoon texture features. To this end, a novel cartoon-texture-saliency-sampler (CTSS) module is proposed to dynamically sample cartoon-texture-salient patches from training data. With extensive experiments, we demonstrate that texture saliency adaptive attention in adversarial learning, as a missing ingredient of related methods in image cartoonization, is of significant importance in facilitating and enhancing image cartoon stylization, especially for high-resolution input pictures.
summary: Image cartoonization is recently dominated by generative adversarial networks (GANs) from the perspective of unsupervised image-to-image translation, in which an inherent challenge is to precisely capture and sufficiently transfer characteristic cartoon styles (e.g., clear edges, smooth color shading, abstract fine structures, etc.). Existing advanced models try to enhance cartoonization effect by learning to promote edges adversarially, introducing style transfer loss, or learning to align style from multiple representation space. This paper demonstrates that more distinct and vivid cartoonization effect could be easily achieved with only basic adversarial loss. Observing that cartoon style is more evident in cartoon-texture-salient local image regions, we build a region-level adversarial learning branch in parallel with the normal image-level one, which constrains adversarial learning on cartoon-texture-salient local patches for better perceiving and transferring cartoon texture features. To this end, a novel cartoon-texture-saliency-sampler (CTSS) module is proposed to dynamically sample cartoon-texture-salient patches from training data. With extensive experiments, we demonstrate that texture saliency adaptive attention in adversarial learning, as a missing ingredient of related methods in image cartoonization, is of significant importance in facilitating and enhancing image cartoon stylization, especially for high-resolution input pictures.
abstract_zh: 从无监督图像到图像翻译的角度来看，图像卡通化最近由生成对抗网络（GAN）主导，其中固有的挑战是精确捕捉并充分转移特征卡通风格（例如清晰的边缘、平滑的色彩阴影、抽象的精细结构等）。现有的高级模型试图通过学习对抗性地提升边缘、引入风格转移损失或学习从多个表示空间对齐风格来增强卡通化效果。本文证明，仅需要基本的对抗性损失就可以轻松实现更清晰、更生动的卡通化效果。观察到卡通风格在卡通纹理显着的局部图像区域中更为明显，我们建立了一个与正常图像级并行的区域级对抗性学习分支，它限制了对卡通纹理显着的局部补丁的对抗性学习，以更好地感知和传输卡通纹理特征。为此，提出了一种新颖的卡通纹理显着性采样器（CTSS）模块，用于从训练数据中动态采样卡通纹理显着性补丁。通过大量的实验，我们证明了对抗性学习中的纹理显着性自适应注意作为图像卡通化相关方法中缺失的成分，对于促进和增强图像卡通风格化具有重要意义，特别是对于高分辨率输入图片。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于纹理显著性自适应注意力的图像卡通化方法，通过改进对抗学习分支提升卡通风格转换效果。
AI.motivation: 现有卡通化模型依赖复杂损失函数却效果有限，而卡通风格在纹理显著区域更明显，需针对性优化对抗学习机制。
AI.method: 构建图像级与区域级并行对抗学习分支，设计纹理显著性采样器（CTSS）动态提取关键局部区域进行对抗训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在高分辨率图像上显著提升卡通化效果，验证了纹理显著性自适应注意力对风格迁移的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 纹理显著性自适应注意力是图像卡通化中被忽视的核心要素，可有效增强对抗学习对卡通特征的感知与转换能力。

To this end, a novel cartoon-texture-saliency-sampler (CTSS) module is proposed to dynamically sample cartoon-texture-salient patches from training data. authors_text: Junru Gu,Chenxu Hu,Tianyuan Zhang,Xuanyao Chen,Yilun Wang,Yue Wang,Hang Zhao
title: ViP3D: End-to-end Visual Trajectory Prediction via 3D Agent Queries
title_zh: ViP3D：通过 3D 代理查询进行端到端视觉轨迹预测
comment: CVPR 2023
comments: CVPR 2023
abstract: Perception and prediction are two separate modules in the existing autonomous driving systems. They interact with each other via hand-picked features such as agent bounding boxes and trajectories. Due to this separation, prediction, as a downstream module, only receives limited information from the perception module. To make matters worse, errors from the perception modules can propagate and accumulate, adversely affecting the prediction results. In this work, we propose ViP3D, a query-based visual trajectory prediction pipeline that exploits rich information from raw videos to directly predict future trajectories of agents in a scene. ViP3D employs sparse agent queries to detect, track, and predict throughout the pipeline, making it the first fully differentiable vision-based trajectory prediction approach. Instead of using historical feature maps and trajectories, useful information from previous timestamps is encoded in agent queries, which makes ViP3D a concise streaming prediction method. Furthermore, extensive experimental results on the nuScenes dataset show the strong vision-based prediction performance of ViP3D over traditional pipelines and previous end-to-end models.
summary: Perception and prediction are two separate modules in the existing autonomous driving systems. They interact with each other via hand-picked features such as agent bounding boxes and trajectories. Due to this separation, prediction, as a downstream module, only receives limited information from the perception module. To make matters worse, errors from the perception modules can propagate and accumulate, adversely affecting the prediction results. In this work, we propose ViP3D, a query-based visual trajectory prediction pipeline that exploits rich information from raw videos to directly predict future trajectories of agents in a scene. ViP3D employs sparse agent queries to detect, track, and predict throughout the pipeline, making it the first fully differentiable vision-based trajectory prediction approach. Instead of using historical feature maps and trajectories, useful information from previous timestamps is encoded in agent queries, which makes ViP3D a concise streaming prediction method. Furthermore, extensive experimental results on the nuScenes dataset show the strong vision-based prediction performance of ViP3D over traditional pipelines and previous end-to-end models.
abstract_zh: 感知和预测是现有自动驾驶系统中两个独立的模块。他们通过精心挑选的特征（例如代理边界框和轨迹）相互交互。由于这种分离，作为下游模块的预测仅从感知模块接收有限的信息。更糟糕的是，感知模块的错误可能会传播和累积，从而对预测结果产生不利影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ViP3D，一种基于查询的视觉轨迹预测管道，它利用原始视频中的丰富信息来直接预测场景中代理的未来轨迹。 ViP3D 采用稀疏代理查询来检测、跟踪和预测整个管道，使其成为第一个完全可微的基于视觉的轨迹预测方法。不使用历史特征图和轨迹，而是将来自先前时间戳的有用信息编码在代理查询中，这使得 ViP3D 成为一种简洁的流预测方法。此外，nuScenes 数据集上的大量实验结果表明，ViP3D 相对于传统流程和之前的端到端模型具有强大的基于视觉的预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViP3D，一种基于3D代理查询的端到端视觉轨迹预测方法，直接利用原始视频信息预测场景中代理的未来轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统自动驾驶系统中感知与预测模块分离，导致预测模块信息受限且感知误差易传播，影响预测效果。
AI.method: 通过稀疏代理查询实现检测、跟踪与预测一体化，首次采用全微分视觉预测方法，利用代理查询编码历史信息而非依赖历史特征图。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上实验表明，ViP3D在视觉预测性能上优于传统流程及先前端到端模型。
AI.conclusion: ViP3D通过端到端架构有效整合感知与预测流程，验证了基于视觉的轨迹预测方法的优越性。

They interact with each other via hand-picked features such as agent bounding boxes and trajectories. Due to this separation, prediction, as a downstream module, only receives limited information from the perception module. To make matters worse, errors from the perception modules can propagate and accumulate, adversely affecting the prediction results. In this work, we propose ViP3D, a query-based visual trajectory prediction pipeline that exploits rich information from raw videos to directly predict future trajectories of agents in a scene. ViP3D employs sparse agent queries to detect, track, and predict throughout the pipeline, making it the first fully differentiable vision-based trajectory prediction approach. Instead of using historical feature maps and trajectories, useful information from previous timestamps is encoded in agent queries, which makes ViP3D a concise streaming prediction method. Furthermore, extensive experimental results on the nuScenes dataset show the strong vision-based prediction performance of ViP3D over traditional pipelines and previous end-to-end models. 感知和预测是现有自动驾驶系统中两个独立的模块。他们通过精心挑选的特征（例如代理边界框和轨迹）相互交互。由于这种分离，作为下游模块的预测仅从感知模块接收有限的信息。更糟糕的是，感知模块的错误可能会传播和累积，从而对预测结果产生不利影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ViP3D，一种基于查询的视觉轨迹预测管道，它利用原始视频中的丰富信息来直接预测场景中代理的未来轨迹。 ViP3D 采用稀疏代理查询来检测、跟踪和预测整个管道，使其成为第一个完全可微的基于视觉的轨迹预测方法。不使用历史特征图和轨迹，而是将来自先前时间戳的有用信息编码在代理查询中，这使得 ViP3D 成为一种简洁的流预测方法。此外，nuScenes 数据集上的大量实验结果表明，ViP3D 相对于传统流程和之前的端到端模型具有强大的基于视觉的预测性能。 本文提出ViP3D，一种基于3D代理查询的端到端视觉轨迹预测方法，直接利用原始视频信息预测场景中代理的未来轨迹。 Junru Gu,Chenxu Hu,Tianyuan Zhang,Xuanyao Chen,Yilun Wang,Yue Wang,Hang Zhao cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Kehinde Olobatuyi
title: Cluster Weighted Model Based on TSNE algorithm for High-Dimensional Data
title_zh: 基于TSNE算法的高维数据聚类加权模型
abstract: Similar to many Machine Learning models, both accuracy and speed of the Cluster weighted models (CWMs) can be hampered by high-dimensional data, leading to previous works on a parsimonious technique to reduce the effect of "Curse of dimensionality" on mixture models. In this work, we review the background study of the cluster weighted models (CWMs). We further show that parsimonious technique is not sufficient for mixture models to thrive in the presence of huge high-dimensional data. We discuss a heuristic for detecting the hidden components by choosing the initial values of location parameters using the default values in the "FlexCWM" R package. We introduce a dimensionality reduction technique called T-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding (TSNE) to enhance the parsimonious CWMs in high-dimensional space. Originally, CWMs are suited for regression but for classification purposes, all multi-class variables are transformed logarithmically with some noise. The parameters of the model are obtained via expectation maximization algorithm. The effectiveness of the discussed technique is demonstrated using real data sets from different fields.
summary: Similar to many Machine Learning models, both accuracy and speed of the Cluster weighted models (CWMs) can be hampered by high-dimensional data, leading to previous works on a parsimonious technique to reduce the effect of "Curse of dimensionality" on mixture models. In this work, we review the background study of the cluster weighted models (CWMs). We further show that parsimonious technique is not sufficient for mixture models to thrive in the presence of huge high-dimensional data. We discuss a heuristic for detecting the hidden components by choosing the initial values of location parameters using the default values in the "FlexCWM" R package. We introduce a dimensionality reduction technique called T-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding (TSNE) to enhance the parsimonious CWMs in high-dimensional space. Originally, CWMs are suited for regression but for classification purposes, all multi-class variables are transformed logarithmically with some noise. The parameters of the model are obtained via expectation maximization algorithm. The effectiveness of the discussed technique is demonstrated using real data sets from different fields.
abstract_zh: 与许多机器学习模型类似，聚类加权模型 (CWM) 的准确性和速度都会受到高维数据的阻碍，导致之前的工作采用简约技术来减少“维数灾难”对混合模型的影响。在这项工作中，我们回顾了聚类加权模型（CWM）的背景研究。我们进一步表明，简约的技术不足以让混合模型在存在大量高维数据的情况下蓬勃发展。我们讨论通过使用“FlexCWM”R 包中的默认值选择位置参数的初始值来检测隐藏组件的启发式方法。我们引入了一种称为 T 分布随机邻域嵌入 (TSNE) 的降维技术，以增强高维空间中的简约 CWM。最初，CWM 适用于回归，但出于分类目的，所有多类变量都经过对数变换，并带有一些噪声。模型的参数通过期望最大化算法获得。使用来自不同领域的真实数据集证明了所讨论技术的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出结合t-SNE算法的聚类加权模型以解决高维数据处理中的维度灾难问题
AI.motivation: 传统简化技术无法有效处理高维数据，需更高效降维方法提升模型性能
AI.method: 采用t-SNE降维结合改进的CWMs，利用EM算法估计参数，并通过FlexCWM初始化及对数变换处理分类变量
AI.result: 实际数据集验证了该方法在多个领域的有效性
AI.conclusion: t-SNE增强的CWMs有效缓解高维数据问题，优于传统方法

authors_text: Arshdeep Singh,James A King,Xubo Liu,Wenwu Wang,Mark D. Plumbley
title: Low-complexity CNNs for Acoustic Scene Classification
title_zh: 用于声学场景分类的低复杂度 CNN
comment: Technical Report DCASE 2022 TASK 1. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2207.11529
comments: Technical Report DCASE 2022 TASK 1. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2207.11529
abstract: This technical report describes the SurreyAudioTeam22s submission for DCASE 2022 ASC Task 1, Low-Complexity Acoustic Scene Classification (ASC). The task has two rules, (a) the ASC framework should have maximum 128K parameters, and (b) there should be a maximum of 30 millions multiply-accumulate operations (MACs) per inference. In this report, we present low-complexity systems for ASC that follow the rules intended for the task.
summary: This technical report describes the SurreyAudioTeam22s submission for DCASE 2022 ASC Task 1, Low-Complexity Acoustic Scene Classification (ASC). The task has two rules, (a) the ASC framework should have maximum 128K parameters, and (b) there should be a maximum of 30 millions multiply-accumulate operations (MACs) per inference. In this report, we present low-complexity systems for ASC that follow the rules intended for the task.
abstract_zh: 本技术报告介绍了 SurreyAudioTeam22s 针对 DCASE 2022 ASC 任务 1（低复杂度声学场景分类 (ASC)）提交的内容。该任务有两条规则，(a) ASC 框架应具有最多 128K 参数，(b) 每个推理最多应有 3000 万次乘法累加运算 (MAC)。在本报告中，我们提出了遵循任务规则的低复杂度 ASC 系统。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是设计符合参数和计算量限制的低复杂度卷积神经网络（CNN），用于声学场景分类。
AI.motivation: 传统声学场景分类模型参数量大、计算复杂度高，难以满足资源受限设备的部署需求，因此需开发轻量化模型以符合任务约束。
AI.method: 采用轻量级CNN架构，结合深度可分离卷积、网络剪枝及量化技术，在保证分类性能的同时严格控制参数量（≤128K）和MAC操作数（≤30M）。
AI.result: 提出的系统满足DCASE 2022任务1的约束条件，并在声学场景分类任务中实现了有效的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 低复杂度CNN设计在资源受限场景下可实现高效的声学场景分类，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Andrew P. Sabelhaus,Zach J. Patterson,Anthony T. Wertz,Carmel Majidi
title: Safe Supervisory Control of Soft Robot Actuators
title_zh: 软体机器人执行器的安全监控
abstract: Although soft robots show safer interactions with their environment than traditional robots, soft mechanisms and actuators still have significant potential for damage or degradation particularly during unmodeled contact. This article introduces a feedback strategy for safe soft actuator operation during control of a soft robot. To do so, a supervisory controller monitors actuator state and dynamically saturates control inputs to avoid conditions that could lead to physical damage. We prove that, under certain conditions, the supervisory controller is stable and verifiably safe. We then demonstrate completely onboard operation of the supervisory controller using a soft thermally-actuated robot limb with embedded shape memory alloy (SMA) actuators and sensing. Tests performed with the supervisor verify its theoretical properties and show stabilization of the robot limb's pose in free space. Finally, experiments show that our approach prevents overheating during contact (including environmental constraints and human contact) or when infeasible motions are commanded. This supervisory controller, and its ability to be executed with completely onboard sensing, has the potential to make soft robot actuators reliable enough for practical use.
summary: Although soft robots show safer interactions with their environment than traditional robots, soft mechanisms and actuators still have significant potential for damage or degradation particularly during unmodeled contact. This article introduces a feedback strategy for safe soft actuator operation during control of a soft robot. To do so, a supervisory controller monitors actuator state and dynamically saturates control inputs to avoid conditions that could lead to physical damage. We prove that, under certain conditions, the supervisory controller is stable and verifiably safe. We then demonstrate completely onboard operation of the supervisory controller using a soft thermally-actuated robot limb with embedded shape memory alloy (SMA) actuators and sensing. Tests performed with the supervisor verify its theoretical properties and show stabilization of the robot limb's pose in free space. Finally, experiments show that our approach prevents overheating during contact (including environmental constraints and human contact) or when infeasible motions are commanded. This supervisory controller, and its ability to be executed with completely onboard sensing, has the potential to make soft robot actuators reliable enough for practical use.
abstract_zh: 尽管软机器人与环境的交互比传统机器人更安全，但软机构和执行器仍然具有巨大的损坏或退化潜力，特别是在未建模的接触期间。本文介绍了软体机器人控制过程中用于安全软体执行器操作的反馈策略。为此，监控控制器监视执行器状态并动态地使控制输入饱和，以避免可能导致物理损坏的情况。我们证明，在某些条件下，监督控制器是稳定的并且可验证安全。然后，我们使用带有嵌入式形状记忆合金 (SMA) 执行器和传感功能的软热驱动机器人肢体来演示监控控制器的完全机载操作。与主管一起进行的测试验证了其理论特性，并显示了机器人肢体在自由空间中的姿势的稳定性。最后，实验表明，我们的方法可以防止接触期间（包括环境限制和人体接触）或命令不可行的运动时过热。该监控控制器及其通过完全板载传感执行的能力，有可能使软体机器人执行器在实际使用中足够可靠。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于软体机器人执行器的安全监督控制策略，以防止在未建模接触情况下发生物理损伤。
AI.motivation: 尽管软体机器人比传统机器人更安全，但其执行器在意外接触时仍存在损坏风险，需通过控制策略提升可靠性。
AI.method: 设计监督控制器实时监测执行器状态，动态限制控制输入，并通过理论证明其稳定性与安全性，结合嵌入式传感实现完全自主运行。
AI.result: 实验验证控制器可有效防止接触过热，稳定机器人姿态，且在复杂环境与人体接触中表现安全。
AI.conclusion: 该监督控制器通过自主传感与动态调整，为软体机器人执行器的实用化提供了可靠的安全保障方案。

conclusion: 该监督控制器通过自主传感与动态调整，为软体机器人执行器的实用化提供了可靠的安全保障方案。
search_text: Safe Supervisory Control of Soft Robot Actuators 软体机器人执行器的安全监控 Although soft robots show safer interactions with their environment than traditional robots, soft mechanisms and actuators still have significant potential for damage or degradation particularly during unmodeled contact. This article introduces a feedback strategy for safe soft actuator operation during control of a soft robot. To do so, a supervisory controller monitors actuator state and dynamically saturates control inputs to avoid conditions that could lead to physical damage. We prove that, under certain conditions, the supervisory controller is stable and verifiably safe. We then demonstrate completely onboard operation of the supervisory controller using a soft thermally-actuated robot limb with embedded shape memory alloy (SMA) actuators and sensing. Tests performed with the supervisor verify its theoretical properties and show stabilization of the robot limb's pose in free space. Finally, experiments show that our approach prevents overheating during contact (including environmental constraints and human contact) or when infeasible motions are commanded. This supervisory controller, and its ability to be executed with completely onboard sensing, has the potential to make soft robot actuators reliable enough for practical use. 尽管软机器人与环境的交互比传统机器人更安全，但软机构和执行器仍然具有巨大的损坏或退化潜力，特别是在未建模的接触期间。本文介绍了软体机器人控制过程中用于安全软体执行器操作的反馈策略。为此，监控控制器监视执行器状态并动态地使控制输入饱和，以避免可能导致物理损坏的情况。我们证明，在某些条件下，监督控制器是稳定的并且可验证安全。然后，我们使用带有嵌入式形状记忆合金 (SMA) 执行器和传感功能的软热驱动机器人肢体来演示监控控制器的完全机载操作。与主管一起进行的测试验证了其理论特性，并显示了机器人肢体在自由空间中的姿势的稳定性。最后，实验表明，我们的方法可以防止接触期间（包括环境限制和人体接触）或命令不可行的运动时过热。该监控控制器及其通过完全板载传感执行的能力，有可能使软体机器人执行器在实际使用中足够可靠。 本文提出一种用于软体机器人执行器的安全监督控制策略，以防止在未建模接触情况下发生物理损伤。 Andrew P. Sabelhaus,Zach J. Patterson,Anthony T. Wertz,Carmel Majidi cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Mihaela Curmei,Andreas Haupt,Dylan Hadfield-Menell,Benjamin Recht
title: Towards Psychologically-Grounded Dynamic Preference Models
title_zh: 迈向基于心理的动态偏好模型
comment: In Sixteenth ACM Conference on Recommender Systems, September 18-23, 2022, Seattle, WA, USA, 14 pages
comments: In Sixteenth ACM Conference on Recommender Systems, September 18-23, 2022, Seattle, WA, USA, 14 pages
abstract: Designing recommendation systems that serve content aligned with time varying preferences requires proper accounting of the feedback effects of recommendations on human behavior and psychological condition. We argue that modeling the influence of recommendations on people's preferences must be grounded in psychologically plausible models. We contribute a methodology for developing grounded dynamic preference models. We demonstrate this method with models that capture three classic effects from the psychology literature: Mere-Exposure, Operant Conditioning, and Hedonic Adaptation. We conduct simulation-based studies to show that the psychological models manifest distinct behaviors that can inform system design. Our study has two direct implications for dynamic user modeling in recommendation systems. First, the methodology we outline is broadly applicable for psychologically grounding dynamic preference models. It allows us to critique recent contributions based on their limited discussion of psychological foundation and their implausible predictions. Second, we discuss implications of dynamic preference models for recommendation systems evaluation and design. In an example, we show that engagement and diversity metrics may be unable to capture desirable recommendation system performance.
summary: Designing recommendation systems that serve content aligned with time varying preferences requires proper accounting of the feedback effects of recommendations on human behavior and psychological condition. We argue that modeling the influence of recommendations on people's preferences must be grounded in psychologically plausible models. We contribute a methodology for developing grounded dynamic preference models. We demonstrate this method with models that capture three classic effects from the psychology literature: Mere-Exposure, Operant Conditioning, and Hedonic Adaptation. We conduct simulation-based studies to show that the psychological models manifest distinct behaviors that can inform system design. Our study has two direct implications for dynamic user modeling in recommendation systems. First, the methodology we outline is broadly applicable for psychologically grounding dynamic preference models. It allows us to critique recent contributions based on their limited discussion of psychological foundation and their implausible predictions. Second, we discuss implications of dynamic preference models for recommendation systems evaluation and design. In an example, we show that engagement and diversity metrics may be unable to capture desirable recommendation system performance.
abstract_zh: 设计提供与随时间变化的偏好相一致的内容的推荐系统需要适当考虑推荐对人类行为和心理状况的反馈影响。我们认为，对推荐对人们偏好的影响进行建模必须基于心理上合理的模型。我们贡献了一种开发扎根动态偏好模型的方法。我们用模型展示了这种方法，这些模型捕捉了心理学文献中的三种经典效应：纯粹暴露、操作性条件作用和享乐适应。我们进行基于模拟的研究，以表明心理模型表现出可以为系统设计提供信息的独特行为。我们的研究对推荐系统中的动态用户建模有两个直接影响。首先，我们概述的方法广泛适用于心理基础的动态偏好模型。它使我们能够根据对心理学基础的有限讨论和令人难以置信的预测来批评最近的贡献。其次，我们讨论动态偏好模型对推荐系统评估和设计的影响。在一个示例中，我们表明参与度和多样性指标可能无法捕获理想的推荐系统性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于心理学原理的动态偏好模型构建方法，用于改进推荐系统中对用户时间变化偏好的建模。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统未能充分考虑推荐反馈对人类行为和心理状态的动态影响，导致模型预测不够准确且缺乏心理学依据。
AI.method: 提出结合心理学效应（单纯曝光效应、操作性条件反射、享乐适应）的建模方法，通过模拟实验验证模型行为差异。
AI.result: 证明心理学模型能展现独特行为特征，揭示传统评估指标（如参与度和多样性）可能无法准确反映推荐系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为动态用户建模提供心理学基础，可批判现有模型的不足，并指导推荐系统更科学的评估与设计。

authors_text: Giovanni Menegozzo,Diego Dall'Alba,Paolo Fiorini
title: CIPCaD-Bench: Continuous Industrial Process datasets for benchmarking Causal Discovery methods
title_zh: CIPCaD-Bench：用于对因果发现方法进行基准测试的连续工业过程数据集
comment: Supplementary Materials at: https://github.com/giovanniMen/CPCaD-Bench
comments: Supplementary Materials at: https://github.com/giovanniMen/CPCaD-Bench
abstract: Causal relationships are commonly examined in manufacturing processes to support faults investigations, perform interventions, and make strategic decisions. Industry 4.0 has made available an increasing amount of data that enable data-driven Causal Discovery (CD). Considering the growing number of recently proposed CD methods, it is necessary to introduce strict benchmarking procedures on publicly available datasets since they represent the foundation for a fair comparison and validation of different methods. This work introduces two novel public datasets for CD in continuous manufacturing processes. The first dataset employs the well-known Tennessee Eastman simulator for fault detection and process control. The second dataset is extracted from an ultra-processed food manufacturing plant, and it includes a description of the plant, as well as multiple ground truths. These datasets are used to propose a benchmarking procedure based on different metrics and evaluated on a wide selection of CD algorithms. This work allows testing CD methods in realistic conditions enabling the selection of the most suitable method for specific target applications. The datasets are available at the following link: https://github.com/giovanniMen
summary: Causal relationships are commonly examined in manufacturing processes to support faults investigations, perform interventions, and make strategic decisions. Industry 4.0 has made available an increasing amount of data that enable data-driven Causal Discovery (CD). Considering the growing number of recently proposed CD methods, it is necessary to introduce strict benchmarking procedures on publicly available datasets since they represent the foundation for a fair comparison and validation of different methods. This work introduces two novel public datasets for CD in continuous manufacturing processes. The first dataset employs the well-known Tennessee Eastman simulator for fault detection and process control. The second dataset is extracted from an ultra-processed food manufacturing plant, and it includes a description of the plant, as well as multiple ground truths. These datasets are used to propose a benchmarking procedure based on different metrics and evaluated on a wide selection of CD algorithms. This work allows testing CD methods in realistic conditions enabling the selection of the most suitable method for specific target applications. The datasets are available at the following link: https://github.com/giovanniMen
abstract_zh: 通常在制造过程中检查因果关系，以支持故障调查、执行干预措施和制定战略决策。工业 4.0 提供了越来越多的数据，支持数据驱动的因果发现 (CD)。考虑到最近提出的 CD 方法越来越多，有必要在公开数据集上引入严格的基准测试程序，因为它们代表了不同方法的公平比较和验证的基础。这项工作介绍了连续制造过程中 CD 的两个新颖的公共数据集。第一个数据集采用著名的田纳西州伊士曼模拟器进行故障检测和过程控制。第二个数据集是从一家超加工食品制造工厂提取的，它包括对该工厂的描述以及多个基本事实。这些数据集用于提出基于不同指标的基准测试程序，并在多种 CD 算法上进行评估。这项工作允许在现实条件下测试 CD 方法，从而为特定目标应用选择最合适的方法。数据集可通过以下链接获取：https://github.com/giovanniMen

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个新的工业连续过程数据集，用于评估因果发现方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0时代数据激增，需公平评估因果发现方法，但缺乏合适基准数据集。
AI.method: 构建两个数据集（Tennessee Eastman模拟器与食品工厂实际数据），设计多指标基准流程评估多种CD算法。
AI.result: 验证了数据集在真实场景下的有效性，帮助选择适合特定应用的CD方法。
AI.conclusion: 为工业因果发现研究提供可靠基准，推动方法优化与应用落地。

authors_text: Paolo G. Cachi,Sebastian Ventura,Krzysztof J. Cios
title: MT-SNN: Spiking Neural Network that Enables Single-Tasking of Multiple Tasks
title_zh: MT-SNN：支持单任务处理多个任务的尖峰神经网络
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures
comments: 4 pages, 2 figures
abstract: In this paper we explore capabilities of spiking neural networks in solving multi-task classification problems using the approach of single-tasking of multiple tasks. We designed and implemented a multi-task spiking neural network (MT-SNN) that can learn two or more classification tasks while performing one task at a time. The task to perform is selected by modulating the firing threshold of leaky integrate and fire neurons used in this work. The network is implemented using Intel's Lava platform for the Loihi2 neuromorphic chip. Tests are performed on dynamic multitask classification for NMNIST data. The results show that MT-SNN effectively learns multiple tasks by modifying its dynamics, namely, the spiking neurons' firing threshold.
summary: In this paper we explore capabilities of spiking neural networks in solving multi-task classification problems using the approach of single-tasking of multiple tasks. We designed and implemented a multi-task spiking neural network (MT-SNN) that can learn two or more classification tasks while performing one task at a time. The task to perform is selected by modulating the firing threshold of leaky integrate and fire neurons used in this work. The network is implemented using Intel's Lava platform for the Loihi2 neuromorphic chip. Tests are performed on dynamic multitask classification for NMNIST data. The results show that MT-SNN effectively learns multiple tasks by modifying its dynamics, namely, the spiking neurons' firing threshold.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探讨了尖峰神经网络使用多任务的单任务方法解决多任务分类问题的能力。我们设计并实现了一种多任务尖峰神经网络（MT-SNN），它可以在一次执行一项任务的同时学习两个或多个分类任务。通过调节本工作中使用的泄漏积分和激发神经元的激发阈值来选择要执行的任务。该网络是使用英特尔 Loihi2 神经拟态芯片的 Lava 平台实现的。对 NMNIST 数据的动态多任务分类进行测试。结果表明，MT-SNN 通过修改其动态，即尖峰神经元的放电阈值，有效地学习多个任务。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种多任务脉冲神经网络（MT-SNN），通过调节漏积分火神经元的发放阈值，实现单次执行多任务分类的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习方法资源消耗大，而脉冲神经网络（SNN）在能效上具有优势，因此探索SNN在单任务模式下处理多任务的可行性。
AI.method: 基于Intel Lava平台实现MT-SNN，利用漏积分火神经元的发放阈值动态调整机制，在Loihi2芯片上对NMNIST数据集进行动态多任务分类测试。
AI.result: 实验表明，通过调节神经元发放阈值，MT-SNN能够有效学习并区分两个或多个分类任务，验证了动态机制的有效性。

search_text: MT-SNN: Spiking Neural Network that Enables Single-Tasking of Multiple Tasks MT-SNN：支持单任务处理多个任务的尖峰神经网络 In this paper we explore capabilities of spiking neural networks in solving multi-task classification problems using the approach of single-tasking of multiple tasks. We designed and implemented a multi-task spiking neural network (MT-SNN) that can learn two or more classification tasks while performing one task at a time. The task to perform is selected by modulating the firing threshold of leaky integrate and fire neurons used in this work. The network is implemented using Intel's Lava platform for the Loihi2 neuromorphic chip. Tests are performed on dynamic multitask classification for NMNIST data. The results show that MT-SNN effectively learns multiple tasks by modifying its dynamics, namely, the spiking neurons' firing threshold. 在本文中，我们探讨了尖峰神经网络使用多任务的单任务方法解决多任务分类问题的能力。我们设计并实现了一种多任务尖峰神经网络（MT-SNN），它可以在一次执行一项任务的同时学习两个或多个分类任务。通过调节本工作中使用的泄漏积分和激发神经元的激发阈值来选择要执行的任务。该网络是使用英特尔 Loihi2 神经拟态芯片的 Lava 平台实现的。对 NMNIST 数据的动态多任务分类进行测试。结果表明，MT-SNN 通过修改其动态，即尖峰神经元的放电阈值，有效地学习多个任务。 本文设计了一种多任务脉冲神经网络（MT-SNN），通过调节漏积分火神经元的发放阈值，实现单次执行多任务分类的能力。 Paolo G. Cachi,Sebastian Ventura,Krzysztof J. Cios cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Vitjan Zavrtanik,Matej Kristan,Danijel Skočaj
title: DSR -- A dual subspace re-projection network for surface anomaly detection
title_zh: DSR——用于表面异常检测的双子空间重投影网络
comment: Presented at ECCV2022
comments: Presented at ECCV2022
abstract: The state-of-the-art in discriminative unsupervised surface anomaly detection relies on external datasets for synthesizing anomaly-augmented training images. Such approaches are prone to failure on near-in-distribution anomalies since these are difficult to be synthesized realistically due to their similarity to anomaly-free regions. We propose an architecture based on quantized feature space representation with dual decoders, DSR, that avoids the image-level anomaly synthesis requirement. Without making any assumptions about the visual properties of anomalies, DSR generates the anomalies at the feature level by sampling the learned quantized feature space, which allows a controlled generation of near-in-distribution anomalies. DSR achieves state-of-the-art results on the KSDD2 and MVTec anomaly detection datasets. The experiments on the challenging real-world KSDD2 dataset show that DSR significantly outperforms other unsupervised surface anomaly detection methods, improving the previous top-performing methods by 10% AP in anomaly detection and 35% AP in anomaly localization.
summary: The state-of-the-art in discriminative unsupervised surface anomaly detection relies on external datasets for synthesizing anomaly-augmented training images. Such approaches are prone to failure on near-in-distribution anomalies since these are difficult to be synthesized realistically due to their similarity to anomaly-free regions. We propose an architecture based on quantized feature space representation with dual decoders, DSR, that avoids the image-level anomaly synthesis requirement. Without making any assumptions about the visual properties of anomalies, DSR generates the anomalies at the feature level by sampling the learned quantized feature space, which allows a controlled generation of near-in-distribution anomalies. DSR achieves state-of-the-art results on the KSDD2 and MVTec anomaly detection datasets. The experiments on the challenging real-world KSDD2 dataset show that DSR significantly outperforms other unsupervised surface anomaly detection methods, improving the previous top-performing methods by 10% AP in anomaly detection and 35% AP in anomaly localization.
abstract_zh: 最先进的判别式无监督表面异常检测依赖于外部数据集来合成异常增强训练图像。这种方法在处理近分布异常时很容易失败，因为这些异常由于与无异常区域的相似性而难以实际合成。我们提出了一种基于量化特征空间表示和双解码器 DSR 的架构，它避免了图像级异常合成的要求。在不对异常的视觉属性做出任何假设的情况下，DSR 通过对学习的量化特征空间进行采样来生成特征级别的异常，从而允许受控地生成近分布异常。 DSR 在 KSDD2 和 MVTec 异常检测数据集上取得了最先进的结果。在具有挑战性的现实世界 KSDD2 数据集上的实验表明，DSR 显着优于其他无监督表面异常检测方法，在异常检测方面将之前表现最好的方法提高了 10% AP，在异常定位方面提高了 35% AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需外部数据集合成异常图像的表面异常检测方法DSR，通过特征级异常生成提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有判别性无监督表面异常检测方法依赖外部数据集合成异常图像，但难以生成与正常区域高度相似的近分布异常，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: DSR基于量化特征空间表示和双解码器架构，在特征层级通过采样学习到的量化特征空间生成可控的近分布异常，无需图像级异常合成。
AI.result: 在KSDD2和MVTec数据集上达到SOTA性能，KSDD2数据集上异常检测AP提升10%，异常定位AP提升35%。
AI.conclusion: DSR通过特征级异常生成机制，在无需假设异常视觉特性的情况下显著提升了无监督表面异常检测的准确性。

authors_text: Camille-Sovanneary Gauthier,Romaric Gaudel,Elisa Fromont
title: UniRank: Unimodal Bandit Algorithm for Online Ranking
title_zh: UniRank：用于在线排名的单峰 Bandit 算法
comment: ef:Complex Feedback in Online Learning Workshop at the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Jul 2022, Baltimore, United States
comments: ef:Complex Feedback in Online Learning Workshop at the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Jul 2022, Baltimore, United States
abstract: We tackle a new emerging problem, which is finding an optimal monopartite matching in a weighted graph. The semi-bandit version, where a full matching is sampled at each iteration, has been addressed by \cite{ADMA}, creating an algorithm with an expected regret matching $O(\frac{L\log(L)}Δ\log(T))$ with $2L$ players, $T$ iterations and a minimum reward gap $Δ$. We reduce this bound in two steps. First, as in \cite{GRAB} and \cite{UniRank} we use the unimodality property of the expected reward on the appropriate graph to design an algorithm with a regret in $O(L\frac{1}Δ\log(T))$. Secondly, we show that by moving the focus towards the main question `\emph{Is user $i$ better than user $j$?}' this regret becomes $O(L\fracΔ{\tildeΔ^2}\log(T))$, where $\TildeΔ > Δ$ derives from a better way of comparing users. Some experimental results finally show these theoretical results are corroborated in practice.
summary: We tackle a new emerging problem, which is finding an optimal monopartite matching in a weighted graph. The semi-bandit version, where a full matching is sampled at each iteration, has been addressed by \cite{ADMA}, creating an algorithm with an expected regret matching $O(\frac{L\log(L)}Δ\log(T))$ with $2L$ players, $T$ iterations and a minimum reward gap $Δ$. We reduce this bound in two steps. First, as in \cite{GRAB} and \cite{UniRank} we use the unimodality property of the expected reward on the appropriate graph to design an algorithm with a regret in $O(L\frac{1}Δ\log(T))$. Secondly, we show that by moving the focus towards the main question `\emph{Is user $i$ better than user $j$?}' this regret becomes $O(L\fracΔ{\tildeΔ^2}\log(T))$, where $\TildeΔ > Δ$ derives from a better way of comparing users. Some experimental results finally show these theoretical results are corroborated in practice.
abstract_zh: 我们解决一个新出现的问题，即在加权图中找到最佳的单部分匹配。半强盗版本在每次迭代时都会采样完整的匹配，已由 \cite{ADMA} 解决，创建了一个算法，其预期后悔匹配 $O(\frac{L\log(L)}Δ\log(T))$ 与 $2L$ 玩家、$T$ 迭代和最小奖励差距 $Δ$。我们分两步减少这个界限。首先，如 \cite{GRAB} 和 \cite{UniRank} 中一样，我们使用适当图上预期奖励的单峰性属性来设计一个带有 $O(L\frac{1}Δ\log(T))$ 遗憾的算法。其次，我们表明，通过将焦点转移到主要问题“\emph{用户 $i$ 比用户 $j$ 更好吗？}”，这种遗憾就变成了 $O(L\fracΔ{\tildeΔ^2}\log(T))$，其中 $\TildeΔ > Δ$ 来自比较用户的更好方法。一些实验结果最终表明这些理论结果在实践中得到了证实。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniRank算法，解决在线排序中加权图最优单分图匹配问题，通过改进遗憾上界提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有半老虎机算法在每次迭代中需采样完整匹配，导致较高遗憾，需通过新方法降低复杂度并优化用户比较方式。
AI.method: 分两步改进：1）利用奖励单峰性设计算法，将遗憾降至O(L/Δ log(T))；2）通过用户间比较问题，进一步优化为O(LΔ/Δ~² log(T))（Δ~>Δ）。
AI.result: 理论分析显示新算法遗憾更优，实验验证了理论结果的正确性。
AI.conclusion: UniRank通过单峰性利用和用户比较优化，有效降低在线排序匹配的遗憾，理论与实验结果一致。

Some experimental results finally show these theoretical results are corroborated in practice. 我们解决一个新出现的问题，即在加权图中找到最佳的单部分匹配。半强盗版本在每次迭代时都会采样完整的匹配，已由 \cite{ADMA} 解决，创建了一个算法，其预期后悔匹配 $O(\frac{L\log(L)}Δ\log(T))$ 与 $2L$ 玩家、$T$ 迭代和最小奖励差距 $Δ$。我们分两步减少这个界限。首先，如 \cite{GRAB} 和 \cite{UniRank} 中一样，我们使用适当图上预期奖励的单峰性属性来设计一个带有 $O(L\frac{1}Δ\log(T))$ 遗憾的算法。其次，我们表明，通过将焦点转移到主要问题“\emph{用户 $i$ 比用户 $j$ 更好吗？}”，这种遗憾就变成了 $O(L\fracΔ{\tildeΔ^2}\log(T))$，其中 $\TildeΔ > Δ$ 来自比较用户的更好方法。一些实验结果最终表明这些理论结果在实践中得到了证实。 本文提出UniRank算法，解决在线排序中加权图最优单分图匹配问题，通过改进遗憾上界提升效率。 Camille-Sovanneary Gauthier,Romaric Gaudel,Elisa Fromont cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Romaric Gaudel,Matthieu Rodet
title: Unimodal Mono-Partite Matching in a Bandit Setting
title_zh: Bandit 设置中的单峰单部分匹配
comment: ef:Complex Feedback in Online Learning Workshop at the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Jul 2022, Baltimore, United States
comments: ef:Complex Feedback in Online Learning Workshop at the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Jul 2022, Baltimore, United States
abstract: We tackle a new emerging problem, which is finding an optimal monopartite matching in a weighted graph. The semi-bandit version, where a full matching is sampled at each iteration, has been addressed by \cite{ADMA}, creating an algorithm with an expected regret matching $O(\frac{L\log(L)}Δ\log(T))$ with $2L$ players, $T$ iterations and a minimum reward gap $Δ$. We reduce this bound in two steps. First, as in \cite{GRAB} and \cite{UniRank} we use the unimodality property of the expected reward on the appropriate graph to design an algorithm with a regret in $O(L\frac{1}Δ\log(T))$. Secondly, we show that by moving the focus towards the main question `\emph{Is user $i$ better than user $j$?}' this regret becomes $O(L\fracΔ{\tildeΔ^2}\log(T))$, where $\TildeΔ > Δ$ derives from a better way of comparing users. Some experimental results finally show these theoretical results are corroborated in practice.
summary: We tackle a new emerging problem, which is finding an optimal monopartite matching in a weighted graph. The semi-bandit version, where a full matching is sampled at each iteration, has been addressed by \cite{ADMA}, creating an algorithm with an expected regret matching $O(\frac{L\log(L)}Δ\log(T))$ with $2L$ players, $T$ iterations and a minimum reward gap $Δ$. We reduce this bound in two steps. First, as in \cite{GRAB} and \cite{UniRank} we use the unimodality property of the expected reward on the appropriate graph to design an algorithm with a regret in $O(L\frac{1}Δ\log(T))$. Secondly, we show that by moving the focus towards the main question `\emph{Is user $i$ better than user $j$?}' this regret becomes $O(L\fracΔ{\tildeΔ^2}\log(T))$, where $\TildeΔ > Δ$ derives from a better way of comparing users. Some experimental results finally show these theoretical results are corroborated in practice.
abstract_zh: 我们解决一个新出现的问题，即在加权图中找到最佳的单部分匹配。半强盗版本在每次迭代时都会采样完整的匹配，已由 \cite{ADMA} 解决，创建了一个算法，其预期后悔匹配 $O(\frac{L\log(L)}Δ\log(T))$ 与 $2L$ 玩家、$T$ 迭代和最小奖励差距 $Δ$。我们分两步减少这个界限。首先，如 \cite{GRAB} 和 \cite{UniRank} 中一样，我们使用适当图上预期奖励的单峰性属性来设计一个带有 $O(L\frac{1}Δ\log(T))$ 遗憾的算法。其次，我们表明，通过将焦点转移到主要问题“\emph{用户 $i$ 比用户 $j$ 更好吗？}”，这种遗憾就变成了 $O(L\fracΔ{\tildeΔ^2}\log(T))$，其中 $\TildeΔ > Δ$ 来自比较用户的更好方法。一些实验结果最终表明这些理论结果在实践中得到了证实。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在老虎机设置下加权图中寻找最优单一分配匹配的问题，提出改进的算法以降低遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在半老虎机版本中的遗憾界较高，本文旨在通过利用单峰性质和优化用户比较方式进一步降低遗憾。
AI.method: 分两步改进：1）利用预期奖励的单峰性设计算法，将遗憾界降至O(L/Δ log(T))；2）通过比较用户优劣的问题，将界优化为O(LΔ/Δ̃² log(T))（Δ̃>Δ）。
AI.result: 理论分析显示新算法遗憾界更优，实验结果验证了理论的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过单峰性质和用户比较优化，本文提出的算法在理论上和实践中均优于现有方法。
